challenges.claim_tested: Knoll 96px is an exact same-master derivative.
challenges.evidence_checked: Reconstructed the 96x96 image in memory from master 5063997597700dd1019625aeadf2e642e6928193972a33d13058f9ea7a3ae70b using the specified 96px contain, LANCZOS resampling, centering, and RGB(22,20,23) background; pixels exactly matched native hash 693970d82d7294d3238561c1716258ebcdb60b21e445af326fa211e36938d918.
challenges.rationale: Lineage is pixel-exact, not merely visually similar.

challenges.claim_tested: Knoll's native first read is a pear-handled stamp contacting one continuous receipt, without forbidden alternate-prop contamination.
challenges.evidence_checked: Native 96px and master show a rounded pear handle, broader tiered circular base, direct base-to-paper contact, and one pale curling receipt continuing through the action. The upper hand grips the handle while the other supports the receipt outside the base.
challenges.rationale: No long shaft, striking head, table, anvil, separate block, cane, staff, or hammer structure is visibly present.

challenges.claim_tested: Knoll's anatomy and hand-to-prop integration support the stamp action at 96px.
challenges.evidence_checked: Compared native 96px against the master: gripping and supporting hands remain spatially distinct, the stamp axis terminates at the receipt, and no detached finger, fused hand, or unsupported prop contact appears.
challenges.rationale: The compressed silhouette preserves a mechanically coherent stamping action.

challenges.claim_tested: The approved matte Vellum assets and not the forbidden shiny alternate were used.
challenges.evidence_checked: Approved raw SHA-256 824b55085428af5ef7e0e760edc76400b333c90d8d71c7703aa97848e6752c18 and cutout SHA-256 6f10ecb18330ec3574a4c5950d8cf89a34fcda466f617d9387de2630607b96a0 match the frozen evidence; the comparison visibly shows the dry matte cutout with no glossy anchor contamination.
challenges.rationale: Hash identity and visible surface treatment independently support the approved Vellum claim.

challenges.claim_tested: The eleven unchanged units show no concrete visible regression.
challenges.evidence_checked: Reviewed the frozen unit evidence across all 12 units and eight dimensions, including native 96px reads and comparison surfaces; unchanged asset hashes remain stable.
challenges.rationale: No observable regression in anatomy, silhouette, hierarchy, palette, prop integration, role read, finish, or cohesion was found.

response_to_peer_evidence.agreement: Both peer reports' decisive READY claims survive adversarial checking.

knoll_final_status.reason: Exact lineage and the native pear-handle, broad-base, receipt-contact stamping read are verified.
